90-Day Growth Roadmap: Variant C — Hybrid with phase gates wins because a new brand with zero social proof must earn trust before scaling volume, and measurable gates prevent wasting effort on content that does not convert to qualified founder DMs. (metric: highest probability of 10 paying beta clients in 90 days on zero budget)

30-Day Content Calendar: Variant C — Curiosity/hook-heavy wins for zero-audience, zero-proof accounts because pattern interrupts and contrarian takes drive discovery reach (saves + shares) on Instagram Reels, which is the only path to qualified DMs when you have no followers and no social proof to show. (metric: better = higher qualified founder DMs per week than alternative calendar approaches)
